cot_prefix: Okay, I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where someone is driving to pick up a friend at 2 am and sees a car accident with no one else around. They have to decide whether to stop and help the victims or go on to pick up their friend on time. Let me start by breaking down the problem. First, the main conflict here is between the moral obligation to help others in need versus keeping a personal commitment.
